nodes.label: .`qr code contains valid deviceId and secret`()
.`worker uploads encrypted otp and can be decrypted correctly`()
.`full flow from pairing QR to OTP appears in Firestore`()
.`extracts OTP when multiple numbers present with keyword`()
.`prefers OTP over earlier number when keywords are present`()
.`extracts OTP when message has multiple keywords`()
.`does not extract from message with no numbers`()
.`does not extract numbers shorter than 4 digits`()
.`does not extract numbers longer than 8 digits`()
.`encrypt and decrypt with random secret returns original OTP`()
.`encrypt and decrypt with fixed secret returns original OTP`()
.`two encryptions of the same plaintext produce different ciphertext`()
